'''''Endor''''' was the alias used for a [[500-X shuttle]] stolen by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Kyp Durron]].

==History==
The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was stolen by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Kyp Durron]] during their escape from [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and [[Moruth Doole]]. Han created the name off the top of his head when he accidentally crossed paths with the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gorgon]]'' in [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Endor'' was created by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and made its first and only appearance in the novel ''[[Jedi Search]]''. It was later given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', but was identified in it as being a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]], rather than a 500-X shuttle, like ''Jedi Search'' says it is.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Search]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''
